title: Gate
description: A recorded gate decision — a checkpoint a Lifecycle PASSED or is BLOCKED_ON (agency/capabilities/gate/_main.py, agency/_substrate_tools.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 coverage). Distinct from GateOutcome (the wire-payload schema).

passed.description: Whether the gate cleared — drives PASSED vs BLOCKED_ON edge + lifecycle state.

evidence.description: The rationale / evidence backing the decision.

question.description: The question posed when the gate is a human-confirm checkpoint (optional).
